stemHtml: ICAO Contracting States set border controls for persons entering and departing. Regarding crew members arriving on duty on an international flight…

options.a: States shall establish measures to expedite the inspection of crew members and their baggage.
options.b: Crew members are subject to the same entry requirements as passengers.
options.c: Crew members must be in uniform to be permitted temporary entry.
options.d: States shall accept the Flight Crew Licence as a valid identity document.
